query: SELECT t.id, t.masterTeamId, t.seasonId, mt.name as masterTeamName, s.name as seasonName FROM teams t LEFT JOIN masterTeams mt ON t.masterTeamId = mt.id LEFT JOIN seasons s ON t.seasonId = s.id WHERE s.name = 'Sample Season (2026)' LIMIT 10
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Tr7sytVxCuD6SR.root --database Fde3d448vCxuYB8KePk65W --execute SELECT t.id, t.masterTeamId, t.seasonId, mt.name as masterTeamName, s.name as seasonName FROM teams t LEFT JOIN masterTeams mt ON t.masterTeamId = mt.id LEFT JOIN seasons s ON t.seasonId = s.id WHERE s.name = 'Sample Season (2026)' LIMIT 10
